summary: Iteration 14 testing: Health & Wellbeing, Education/PEP tabs, Dashboard Attention Now strip, and Fraunces+Geist typography. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests passed (test_iteration14.py). Frontend: login, dashboard Attention Now card (score 55/100, 3 pills + view-all link), all 12 resident tabs present, Health tab (appointments/observations/immunisations modals + add buttons + overdue banner for Maddy), Education tab (edit modal + PEP banner with OVERDUE on Leo + attendance 94.2% for Jordan) all working. Typography — body=Geist, headings=Fraunces — verified via computed styles and visible serif rendering.
action_items: (Optional) Fraunces + Geist fonts do not appear as explicit <link rel=stylesheet> in <head>. The browser computes Geist/Fraunces correctly (likely loaded via @import in index.css), but if reliability across networks is a concern, consider moving to preconnect + <link> tags in public/index.html for faster first paint.

(Observation, no fix needed) When add-observation modal click is preceded by an Escape-closed modal within the same interaction sequence, teardown can race the next open in headless Playwright (obs-modal sometimes did not mount). Fresh re-opens work fine; likely test-only flake.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /residents/{rid}/health and /residents/{rid}/education correctly strip mongo _id via projection and check resident existence — good.

PATCH /api/health/appointments/{aid} requires full HealthAppointmentIn body (no partial patch model). Same pattern as medications PATCH from iter-13 — acceptable for MVP, worth a shared partial-update pattern later.

POST /api/residents/{rid}/health/observations is accessible by any authenticated user (staff can record obs) while DELETE is also any user — consider restricting DELETE to manager/admin for consistency with appointments/immunisations deletes.

POST /education/exclusions and /education/achievements use $push + $setOnInsert; note that on first insert the $setOnInsert sets the complementary field to [] while $push adds to the target — works correctly (tested), but a small comment in code would help future maintainers.

DELETE /api/health/observations/{oid} uses get_current_user (any role); the review-request doesn't specify required role so keeping as-is is fine, but inconsistent with appointment/immunisation DELETE (manager+ only). Clarify policy.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of required selectors and flows verified

test_credentials: manager@care.local / Manager@123 ; staff@care.local / Staff@123 ; admin@care.local / Admin@123
seed_data_creation: Tests created transient TEST_iter14 records (GP appointment, weight observation, Flu immunisation, achievement, exclusion, Education upsert). All health records were DELETEd in cleanup. Education doc is upserted on Aisha so school is now 'TEST_iter14 High' with attendance 92.5 and a single TEST achievement + TEST exclusion remaining — minor seed pollution on Aisha's education record only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter-14 shipped cleanly. Backend health + education APIs verified with CRUD and data-persistence assertions. Attention Now card renders on dashboard with overall=55 in dev (score<100 so strip shows). Fraunces+Geist load via @import in index.css — not via <link> in index.html. All 12 resident tabs wired. Aisha's education record is now set to TEST_iter14 High 92.5% with TEST achievement/exclusion (teardown did not PUT back to blank — consider re-seeding before next full UAT). Leo's next_pep_date is seeded overdue and the OVERDUE badge renders. Maddy's Td/IPV immunisation shows in overdue-immunisations banner.
rca of the issue: N/A — no production bugs found this iteration.
